• They shot scenes specifically for the format
• It's not releasing in the US in IMAX 

"You will feel like you're standing on the edge of a skyscraper ... you'll feel the web vibrating as you're https:

데스틴 다니엘 크레튼(Destin Daniel Cretton)은 '스파이더맨: 브랜 뉴 데이(Spider-Man: Brand New Day)'가 'IMAX용으로 제작됐다'고 말합니다 🕸️

• 해당 형식을 위해 특별히 장면을 촬영했습니다.
• 미국에서는 IMAX로 개봉되지 않습니다. 

"초고층 건물의 가장자리에 서 있는 듯한 느낌을 받게 될 것입니다. https://www.google.com/에서 웹이 진동하는 것을 느낄 것입니다.

bsky.name: PEIPolitical 🇨🇦
bsky.text:
Eby: "I feel sorry for Americans. If you can't be friends with Canada, then you almost certainly do not have a friend anywhere in the world. And that is a very lonely place to be."
#cdnpoli

bsky.name: REMALONE
bsky.text: I have to admit that I didn’t know, and I even thought the Spanish player Cucurella’s look was quite original, when it comes to his hair, but I was unaware of this: If he let his hair grow , it’s so that his autistic son can easily recognize him  when he watches him on TV. Truly,

bsky.name: Annaleigh Watts 🇲🇽
bsky.text: Mamdani is a man of actual principles and dignity. It's incredible to watch from Los Angeles.

bsky.name: Canis Latranscendental
bsky.text: Really cute how guys who have never read The Illiad or The Odyssey suddenly have opinions about ancient Greek literature.

bsky.name: Lynda Steele 🇨🇦
bsky.text: Never been a better time to be a political cartoonist. (sadly)

bsky.name: Colin Dickey
bsky.text: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adaptation of a book that has a cyclops and a couple of witches and some giants. I’m begging you.

bsky.name: Luca
